slide1_body: Urubuga rwa mbere rw'abaturage rwo gukurikirana imyanda ya plastike i Kigali. Hamwe, dushobora guhindura ibihe.
slide2_body: Tanga raporo (+{{report}} amn.), andika ugusubiza (+{{recycling}} amn.), emezwa (+{{bonus}} inyongera). Amanota afungura ibihembo n'ibimenyetso.
slide3_body: Suhanya n'abaturanyi bo mu murenge wawe. Abaturage ba mbere bafungura ibimenyetso by'ihariye n'icyizere cy'umuryango.
slide4_body: Tangira raporo yawe ya mbere ubone amanota {{report}} ubu nonaha. Kigali ikutezeho!
